package rulecoverage

func PositiveHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecode() string {
    ruleID := "http_status_ignored_before_decode"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Response decoding or body consumption that happens without an observed StatusCode check."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
